cost_assumptions.commission: synthetic nonzero commission assumption for diagnostics planning only
cost_assumptions.slippage: synthetic nonzero slippage assumption; no execution evidence is produced

dataset_scope.source: tiny synthetic governance fixture metadata, not real market data

locked_test_policy.allowed_touch: locked test may not be inspected during diagnostics planning
locked_test_policy.contamination_handling: any later locked-test contact must be recorded as contamination metadata
locked_test_policy.oos_reuse: out-of-sample reuse is prohibited unless a later ledger records it explicitly

split_protocol.locked_test: final synthetic fixture interval reserved and untouched by diagnostics planning
split_protocol.train: first synthetic fixture interval for fitting-free diagnostics metadata
split_protocol.validation: middle synthetic fixture interval for diagnostics metadata

stopping_rules: stop when observed variants reach the declared variant budget
stop when a required negative control is missing from the future diagnostics plan
stop if locked-test contact occurs without contamination metadata
